title: Double Helix Words
description: An animated text component that displays words in a double-helix style motion, ideal for dynamic headlines or creative effects.
summary: A visually striking text animation component that mimics the motion of a double helix.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `DoubleHelixWords` works.

<DoubleHelixWordsDemosUsage />

## Properties

Interactive configurator to explore customization options for the `DoubleHelixWords` component.

<DoubleHelixWordsDemosConfigurator />

## API References

### Styles API

```ts
type T = "root" | "backbone" | "bases";
```

| Styles API    | Type                                | Default     | Annotation                     |
| ------------- | ----------------------------------- | ----------- | ------------------------------ |
| className`?`  | `string`                            | `undefined` | pass to root component `<div>` |
| classNames`?` | `Partial<Record<T, string>>`        | `undefined` |                                |
| style`?`      | `CSSProperties`                     | `undefined` | pass to root component `<div>` |
| styles`?`     | `Partial<Record<T, CSSProperties>>` | `undefined` |                                |

### Props API

| Props API       | Type                                    | Default                                               | Annotation |
| --------------- | --------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- | ---------- |
| el`?`           | `Partial<Record<T, React.ElementType>>` | `root: "article", backbone: "section", bases: "span"` |            |
| placeholders`?` | `string \| string[]`                    | `undefined`                                           |            |
| gap`?`          | `number`                                | `6`                                                   |            |
| distance`?`     | `number`                                | `100`                                                 |            |
| speed`?`        | `number`                                | `400`                                                 |            |
| duration`?`     | `number`                                | `4000`                                                |            |

---

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

`,(0,r.jsx)(l,{name:"double-helix-words",code:`"use client";\r
import * as React from "react";\r
import { cn } from "@/utils/cn";\r
\r
type NestedRecord<U extends [string, unknown], T extends string> = {\r
  [K in U as K[0]]?: Partial<Record<T, K[1]>>;\r
};\r
type CSSProperties = React.CSSProperties & { [key: string]: any };\r
type T = "root" | "backbone" | "bases";\r
type U = ["el", React.ElementType] | ["styles", CSSProperties] | ["classNames", string];\r
export interface DoubleHelixWordsProps extends Omit<React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>, HTMLElement>, "children">, NestedRecord<U, T> {\r
  placeholders: string | string[];\r
  gap?: number;\r
  distance?: number;\r
  speed?: number;\r
  duration?: number;\r
  style?: CSSProperties;\r
  el?: Partial<Record<T, React.ElementType>>;\r
}\r
export function useDoubleHelixWords({ el, placeholders, duration = 4000 }: DoubleHelixWordsProps) {\r
  const words = Array.isArray(placeholders) ? placeholders.join(" ") : placeholders || "";\r
  const refFirst = React.useRef<HTMLElement>(null);\r
  const refLast = React.useRef<HTMLElement>(null);\r
\r
  React.useEffect(() => {\r
    const firstRef = refFirst.current;\r
    const lastRef = refLast.current;\r
    if (!firstRef || !lastRef) return;\r
\r
    const elements = words.split("").map((char, i) => {\r
      function createElement(offset: number) {\r
        const inner = document.createElement((el?.bases as string) || "span");\r
        inner.innerText = char;\r
        inner.style.animationDelay = \`-\${i * (duration / 16) - offset}ms\`;\r
        return inner;\r
      }\r
      const firstWrap = createElement(0);\r
      const lastWrap = createElement(-duration / 2);\r
      firstRef.appendChild(firstWrap);\r
      lastRef.appendChild(lastWrap);\r
\r
      return { firstWrap, lastWrap };\r
    });\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      elements.forEach(({ firstWrap, lastWrap }) => {\r
        firstRef.removeChild(firstWrap);\r
        lastRef.removeChild(lastWrap);\r
      });\r
    };\r
  }, [el?.bases, duration, words]);\r
\r
  return { refFirst, refLast };\r
}\r
\r
export const DoubleHelixWords = React.forwardRef<HTMLElement, DoubleHelixWordsProps>((_props, ref) => {\r
  const { el = { root: "article", backbone: "section", bases: "span" }, placeholders, duration, className, classNames, style, styles, gap = 6, distance = 100, speed = 400, suppressHydrationWarning = true, ...props } = _props;\r
\r
  const Root: React.ElementType = el.root as React.ElementType;\r
  const Backbone: React.ElementType = el.backbone as React.ElementType;\r
\r
  const { refFirst, refLast } = useDoubleHelixWords({ el, placeholders, duration });\r
\r
  return (\r
    <Root\r
      {...{\r
        ref,\r
        suppressHydrationWarning,\r
        "data-animation": "double-helix-words",\r
        className: cn("stylelayer-doublehelixwords", className, classNames?.root),\r
        style: {\r
          "--gap": \`\${Math.max(0, Math.min(100, gap))}px\`,\r
          "--distance": \`\${Math.max(0, Math.min(100, distance))}px\`,\r
          "--speed": \`\${Math.max(200, Math.min(1200, speed)) * 10}ms\`,\r
          ...style,\r
          ...styles?.root\r
        } as CSSProperties,\r
        ...props\r
      }}\r
    >\r
      <Backbone {...{ ref: refFirst, suppressHydrationWarning, className: classNames?.backbone, style: styles?.backbone }} />\r
      <Backbone {...{ ref: refLast, suppressHydrationWarning, className: classNames?.backbone, style: styles?.backbone }} />\r
    </Root>\r
  );\r
});\r
DoubleHelixWords.displayName = "DoubleHelixWords";`,ext:".tsx",repo:"web/components/double-helix-words.tsx",css:`/* double-helix-words */\r
@layer base {\r
  .stylelayer-doublehelixwords {\r
    & > * {\r
      @apply absolute size-full flex flex-row items-center justify-center gap-[--gap,8px] pointer-events-none select-none;\r
      & * {\r
        @apply [transform:translateY(calc(sin(var(--angle))*var(--distance,100px)))_scale(calc(cos(var(--angle))*0.5+0.5))] [animation:spiral_var(--speed,4s)_linear_infinite] pointer-events-none select-none;\r
      }\r
    }\r
  }\r
  @property --angle {\r
    syntax: "<angle>";\r
    initial-value: 0deg;\r
    inherits: false;\r
  }\r
  @keyframes spiral {\r
    0% {\r
      --angle: 0deg;\r
    }\r
    50% {\r
      opacity: 0;\r
    }\r
    100% {\r
      --angle: 360deg;\r
    }\r
  }\r
}`})]})}function p(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,r.jsx)(h,{...n})}):h(n)}function i(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return v(R);})();
;return Component;
